sections.paragraph:
verb לפרש

to interpret, explain, clarify, specify

verb פורש (>>פֹּרַשׁ)

be interpreted

verb להפריש

to secrete, discharge, give off; defecate; set aside, allocate, devote; separate

verb הופרש

be secreted, discharged, exuded; be set aside, allocated, devoted; separated

verb לפרש (>>פירש)

to interpret, explain, clarify, specify

noun

horseman, cavalier, rider, knight, equestrian, hussar, outrider, trooper, caballero, dragoon
